title: Olive leaf multi-product cascade based biorefinery.
subtitle: From an under-used biomass in the primary sector to tailormade solutions for high added value international market applications.
description: The OLEAF4VALUE project develops a multi-step biorefinery process to valorise underutilised olive leaf biomass into high-value bioactive compounds. It integrates advanced technologies such as enzymatic biotransformation, molecular imprinting, and novel formulations to produce ingredients for food, feed, cosmetic, and pharmaceutical markets while promoting sustainability.
